query:
INSERT INTO exif_metas(
        id,
        rating,
        city,
        date_taken,
        iso,
        aperture,
        shutter_speed,
        focal_length,
        exposure_compensation,
        camera_maker,
        camera_name,
        lens_maker,
        lens_name,
        crop_factor,
        photo_id,
        fuji_recipe_id
    )
    VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
